internal.description: Self-referencing FK to the original evaluation an override row supersedes. Restrict on delete so the audit chain cannot be broken silently.

outbound.description: Column + index in place. FK constraint deferred until the Facilities module lands. Nullable to support future workspace-scoped evaluations without a specific branch.
The admin who approved an override. Set only on override rows.

Polymorphic pointer to the entity the evaluation is on behalf of (staff clock-in, attendance record, reception visit). Resolved via the morph map. FK integrity enforced application-side, not by DB constraint.

inbound.description: Consuming modules (staff-clock-in-out, athlete-self-check-in, visitor-auto-log, attendance) stamp `geofence_check_id` on their own record. Those FKs are OWNED BY THE CONSUMER, not by this module. They point AT geofence_checks(id) with onDelete='set null' or 'no action' (choice depends on the consumer's own retention policy).

morph_map_registration.description: Consuming modules MUST enforce a morph alias for the subject_type they emit. Alias is a snake_case identifier registered via Relation::enforceMorphMap() in the consumer's EventServiceProvider.
